mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna
AND question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWord}, '%')

SELECT n.notice_id AS noticeId, u.user_id AS adminId, u.name AS adminName, n.title, n.content, n.notice_id AS noticeId, n.target_role_id AS targetRoleId, r.role_name AS roleName, DATE_FORMAT(n.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM (SELECT * FROM notice WHERE notice_id = #{noticeId}) n INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = n.target_role_id INNER JOIN user u ON n.admin_id = u.user_id

SELECT ab.album_id AS albumId, ab.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName, ab.title AS title, ab.description, DATE_FORMAT(ab.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt, ap.photo_id AS photoId, ap.file_path AS filePath FROM album ab INNER JOIN ( SELECT album_id, MIN(photo_id) AS max_photo_id FROM album_photo GROUP BY album_id ) latest_photo ON ab.album_id = latest_photo.album_id INNER JOIN album_photo ap ON ap.photo_id = latest_photo.max_photo_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON lt.lecture_id = ab.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id

SELECT ab.album_id AS albumId, ab.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName, ab.title AS title, ab.description, DATE_FORMAT(ab.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM (SELECT * FROM album WHERE album_id = #{albumId}) ab INNER JOIN lecture lt ON lt.lecture_id = ab.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON sb.subject_id = lt.subject_id
SELECT photo_id AS photoId, album_id AS albumId, file_path AS filePath FROM album_photo WHERE album_id = #{albumId};
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna WHERE answer IS NULL;
SELECT qna_id AS qnaId, parent_id AS parentId, admin_id AS adminId, question, answer, created_at AS createdAt, answered_at AS answeredAt FROM qna WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId};
SELECT role_id AS roleId, role_name AS roleName FROM role ORDER BY role_id

SELECT sb.name AS subjectName, u.name AS teacherName, cr.name AS classroomName, cr.location AS location, lt.lecture_id AS lectureId, lt.start_time AS startTime, lt.end_time AS endTime, lt.day_of_week AS 'dayOfWeek', lt.start_date AS startDate, lt.end_date AS endDate FROM (SELECT * FROM lecture WHERE end_date >= CURDATE() )lt INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom cr ON lt.classroom_id = cr.classroom_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user u ON ta.teacher_id = u.user_id
SELECT subject_id AS subjectId, NAME AS subjectName, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM subject ORDER BY createdAT DESC
SELECT subject_id AS subjectId, NAME AS subjectName, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM subject WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
mapper.update: UPDATE student_enrollment SET status = 'REFUND' WHERE status = 'REFUNDWAIT' AND enrollment_id = #{enrollmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT vc.vehicle_id AS vehicleId, vc.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, dr.user_id AS driverId, vc.capacity, IFNULL(dr.name,'') AS driverName, IFNULL(dr.phone,'') AS phone, IFNULL(va.location,'') AS location FROM vehicle vc LEFT OUTER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON va.vehicle_id = vc.vehicle_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user dr ON dr.user_id = va.driver_id;
SELECT vehicle_id AS vehicleId, vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, capacity FROM vehicle WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId};

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.name AS userName, u.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, u.email, u.phone, u.address, u.birth FROM user u INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = u.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT user_id AS userId, NAME AS userName, phone, email FROM user WHERE role_id = 5;

SELECT st.user_id AS userId, st.name AS userName, st.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, st.email, st.phone, st.address, st.birth FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{parentId}) pa INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON pa.user_id = sp.parent_id INNER JOIN user st ON sp.student_id = st.user_id INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = st.role_id

SELECT pa.user_id AS userId, pa.name AS userName, pa.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, pa.email, pa.phone, pa.address, pa.birth FROM (SELECT * FROM user WHERE user_id = #{studentId}) st INNER JOIN student_parent sp ON st.user_id = sp.student_id INNER JOIN user pa ON sp.parent_id = pa.user_id INNER JOIN role r ON r.role_id = pa.role_id

SELECT v.vehicle_no AS vehicleNo, v.capacity, l.end_time AS endTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek FROM vehicle v INNER JOIN vehicle_assignment va ON v.vehicle_id = va.vehicle_id INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = va.driver_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = va.lecture_id WHERE u.user_id = #{driverId}
SELECT history_id AS historyId, teacher_id AS teacherId, last_education AS lastEducation, personal_history AS personalHistory FROM teacher_history WHERE teacher_id = #{teacherId}
SELECT assignment_id AS assignmentId, lecture_id AS lectureId, vehicle_id AS vehicleId, driver_id AS driverId, location FROM vehicle_assignment WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO album (lecture_id, title, description, created_at) VALUES (#{lectureId}, #{title}, #{description}, NOW())

INSERT INTO lecture ( subject_id, classroom_id, recruited, amount, start_time, end_time, day_of_week, start_date, end_date) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{classroomId}, #{recruited}, #{amount}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{startDate}, #{endDate})
mapper.select: SELECT classroom_id AS classroomId, NAME AS classroomName, location, capacity FROM classroom
SELECT user_id AS userId, NAME AS userName FROM user WHERE role_id = 3

SELECT lecture_id AS lectureId, subject_id AS subjectId, classroom_id AS classroomId, recruited, amount, start_time AS startTime, end_time AS endTime, day_of_week AS 'dayOfWeek', start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate FROM lecture WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}
SELECT lecture_id AS lectureId, teacher_id AS teacherId FROM teacher_assignment WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}
SELECT assignment_id AS assignmentId FROM vehicle_assignment WHERE lecture_id = #{lectureId}

SELECT cr.classroom_id AS classroomId, cr.name AS classroomName, cr.location AS location, cr.capacity, IFNULL(sb.name, '미배정') AS subjectName, IFNULL(t.name, '미배정') AS teacherName, lt.start_time AS startTime, lt.end_time AS endTime FROM classroom cr LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * FROM lecture WHERE end_date >= CURDATE()) lt ON cr.classroom_id = lt.classroom_id LEFT OUTER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id LEFT OUTER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id LEFT OUTER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO classroom (name, location, capacity) VALUES (#{classroomName}, #{location}, #{capacity})
mapper.select: SELECT classroom_id AS classroomId, NAME AS classroomName, location, capacity FROM classroom WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT m.material_id AS materialId, s.name AS subjectName, m.material_title AS materialTitle, m.total_count AS totalCount, m.used_count AS usedCount, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, l.start_time AS startTime FROM material m INNER JOIN lecture l ON m.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON l.subject_id = s.subject_id
SELECT lt.lecture_id AS lectureId, sb.name AS subjectName FROM lecture lt INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material (lecture_id, material_title, total_count, used_count) VALUES (#{lectureId}, #{materialTitle}, #{totalCount}, #{usedCount})
mapper.select: SELECT material_id AS materialId, lecture_id AS lectureId, material_title AS materialTitle, total_count AS totalCount, used_count AS usedCount FROM material WHERE material_id = #{materialId}

SELECT mr.request_id AS requestId, mr.content, mr.requested_at AS requestedAt, u.name teacherName, s.name AS subjectName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, mr.status FROM material_request mr INNER JOIN lecture l ON mr.lecture_id = l.lecture_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id INNER JOIN user u ON ta.teacher_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id

SELECT a.attendance_id AS attendanceId, u.name AS studentName, a.attend_date AS attendDate, a.status, s.name AS subjectName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, c.name AS classroomName, t1.teacherName FROM attendance a INNER JOIN payment p ON a.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = se.student_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = se.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom c ON l.classroom_id = c.classroom_id INNER JOIN (SELECT l.lecture_id, u.name teacherName FROM user u INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON u.user_id = ta.teacher_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id) t1 ON l.lecture_id = t1.lecture_id

SELECT a.attendance_id AS attendanceId, u.name AS studentName, a.attend_date AS attendDate, a.status, s.name AS subjectName, l.start_time AS startTime, l.day_of_week AS dayOfWeek, c.name AS classroomName, t1.teacherName FROM attendance a INNER JOIN payment p ON a.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN user u ON u.user_id = se.student_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = se.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject s ON s.subject_id = l.subject_id INNER JOIN classroom c ON l.classroom_id = c.classroom_id INNER JOIN (SELECT l.lecture_id, u.name teacherName FROM user u INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON u.user_id = ta.teacher_id INNER JOIN lecture l ON l.lecture_id = ta.lecture_id) t1 ON l.lecture_id = t1.lecture_id WHERE a.attendance_id = #{attendanceId}

SELECT sf.satisfaction_id AS satisfactionId, sb.name AS subjectName, u.name AS studentName, sf.rating_lecture AS ratingLecture, sf.created_at AS createAt, ifnull(r.content, '리뷰 작성 전') AS content, ifnull(r.created_at, '리뷰 작성 전') AS reivewCreateAt FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN review r ON sf.satisfaction_id = r.satisfaction_id

SELECT sf.satisfaction_id AS satisfactionId, sb.name AS subjectName, u.name AS studentName, t.name AS teacherName, sf.rating_teacher AS ratingTeacher, sf.created_at AS createAt FROM satisfaction sf INNER JOIN payment p ON sf.payment_id = p.payment_id INNER JOIN student_enrollment se ON p.enrollment_id = se.enrollment_id INNER JOIN lecture lt ON se.lecture_id = lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN teacher_assignment ta ON lt.lecture_id INNER JOIN subject sb ON lt.subject_id = sb.subject_id INNER JOIN user u ON se.student_id = u.user_id INNER JOIN user t ON ta.teacher_id = t.user_id
